# ADR-<NNN>: <short decision title>

> Architecture Decision Record (Nygard format). One file per significant decision, so the
> *why* is auditable later. Authored in `.md`, rendered to `.html`.

> **Document control** · ID `ADR-001` · Version `0.1` · Status `Draft | In review | Approved`
> · Classification `Internal | Confidential` · Owner `<name / role>` · As-of `<YYYY-MM-DD>`
>
> | Version | Date | Author | Change |
> |---|---|---|---|
> | 0.1 | <YYYY-MM-DD> | <author> | Initial draft |

| | |
|---|---|
| **Status** | proposed / accepted / superseded by ADR-<n> |
| **Date** | <YYYY-MM-DD> |
| **Deciders** | <agents / people> |
| **Traceability** | BRD/FSD/REQ: `<BRD-### / FSD-### / REQ-###>` · Obligation: `<e.g. MAR Art.12 / 6AMLD Art.18>` |

## Context
The forces at play: the problem, constraints, regulatory drivers, and what makes this
decision necessary now.

## Decision
What we are doing, stated plainly.

## Consequences
The trade-offs - positive and negative - that follow from the decision, including any new
risks or obligations.

## Alternatives considered
Options weighed and why they were not chosen.

## Implementation status & follow-up
Record the current implementation state and any follow-up actions required. Update this
section as the decision moves from accepted to implemented.

| Item | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Implementation status | <not started / in progress / complete / superseded> |
| Implementing agent / team | <rules-developer / platform-engineer / …> |
| Target completion | <YYYY-MM-DD or sprint/release ref> |
| Follow-up actions | <e.g. update RTM, re-tune thresholds, compliance-reviewer sign-off> |
| Linked tickets / PRs | <ref> |

## Sign-off
| Role | Name | Decision | Date |
|------|------|----------|------|
| Author / owner | | | |
| `compliance-reviewer` (DoD gate) | | | |
| Human approver (or `[IT team]`) | | | |
